headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on A.O. Smith, Lowers Price Target to $75
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Bryan Blair   maintains A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $80 to $75.

headline: New Strong Sell Stocks for June 10th
summary: AOS, APOG and ASH have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on June 10, 2026.
